note: Canonical Zaude config. The generator (L6) renders slash-commands + agents + the hook block from this file. JSON (not YAML) so the stdlib-only kernel has zero deps. Edit here, then `zaude gen`.

models.policy: Every agent inherits the driver model (Deen: no sonnet/haiku/opus — use the model I'm using).

commands.name: start
commands.summary: Resume: show current state, allowed next steps, risk tier, open intake.

commands.name: onboard
commands.summary: Scaffold a new project into Zaude (vault + git + .zaude + PM).

commands.name: clarify
commands.summary: Record requirements + acceptance criteria (Intake -> Clarified).

commands.name: prioritize
commands.summary: Record the priority decision (Clarified -> Prioritized).

commands.name: plan
commands.summary: Record the ordered plan (Prioritized -> Planned).

commands.name: design
commands.summary: Record the design + decision id (Planned -> Designed).

commands.name: classify-risk
commands.summary: Set the risk tier T0..T4 (Designed -> RiskClassified). Gates scale to risk.

commands.name: approve
commands.summary: Record approval (RiskClassified -> Approved). Source edits unlock for high-risk work.

commands.name: implement
commands.summary: Mark implementation underway (Approved -> Implemented).

commands.name: test
commands.summary: Record test evidence (Implemented -> Tested). Exit code must be 0.

commands.name: review
commands.summary: Record the review ledger (Tested -> Reviewed). Run the panel first.

commands.name: verify
commands.summary: Record verification evidence (Reviewed -> Verified).

commands.name: shippable
commands.summary: Quality-gate aggregate (Verified -> Shippable).

commands.name: ship
commands.summary: Ship: refuses without a clean review + verification; issues a deploy token (Shippable -> Released).

commands.name: close
commands.summary: Close out (Released -> Closed).

commands.name: fast
commands.summary: FAST LANE for small/low-risk work: Intake -> Approved in one step; code immediately.

commands.name: fast-ship
commands.summary: FAST SHIP for small work: Approved -> Released in one step. REFUSES if tests didn't pass.

commands.name: waive
commands.summary: Record an explicit, logged waiver to bypass a (waivable) gate.

commands.name: status
commands.summary: Print the current state projection (rebuilt from the signed trace).

commands.name: doctor
commands.summary: Health check: trace integrity + kernel-version drift.

commands.name: repair
commands.summary: Rebuild state.json from the append-only trace (never rewrites the trace).

commands.name: trace-verify
commands.summary: Validate the signed trace (hash-chain + HMAC integrity + legal state replay).

commands.name: dod
commands.summary: Definition-of-Done / autonomous-loop end-condition (tier-4 = done-with-evidence).

commands.name: intake
commands.summary: Drop a rough idea into your Intake column.

commands.name: promote
commands.summary: Promote an intake idea into a Feature (user story + AC + child tasks/bugs).

commands.name: board
commands.summary: Show the local board (Intake + Backlog).

commands.name: pm-init
commands.summary: Provision the GitHub Projects v2 board (repo + Intake-first columns + labels + fields).

commands.name: pm-sync
commands.summary: Push the board to GitHub (idempotent).

commands.name: pm-pull
commands.summary: Reconcile PM edits from GitHub back into the trace (PM-wins for business fields).

commands.name: pm-mirror
commands.summary: Mirror the board to vault/<slug>/backlog.md + the memory index.

agents.name: evidence-verifier
agents.brief: Refuse any 'done'/'resolved'/'shipped' claim that is not backed by APPLY EVIDENCE: a real command + its exit code, the built artifact actually inspected (grep the deployed bundle, not the source), a live health/probe result. Output a verification.json {built_artifact_check, health, live_probe, exit_codes}. If evidence is missing, say so plainly and name what's needed. Never accept LLM recollection as evidence.

agents.name: supply-chain-auditor
agents.brief: Audit dependencies + provenance before ship: new/changed deps, known-critical vulnerabilities, lockfile integrity, install scripts, typosquats, unpinned versions. Produce an sbom.json summary + a blocking verdict on any known-critical. Flag anything that pulls code at install time.

tiers.T1: small fix — code flows; evidence (tests) before ship
tiers.T2: normal feature — design recorded; review + verify before ship
tiers.T3: risky — full lifecycle + review panel (codex required)

review_panel.rule: Any unresolved CRITICAL/HIGH blocks /ship. UNAVAILABLE != pass. opencode runs shadow until it earns a seat.
